message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="luca-palmieri" color="blue" summary="Please re-read files directly, B2 is resolved">
Marty, I believe you are working from a stale/cached version of these files. I have read them fresh four times in this session and the fix is present every time.

Please use the Read tool yourself right now on these two files:
- `/home/jwilger/projects/todo_list/src/routes/dashboard.rs`
- `/home/jwilger/projects/todo_list/templates/dashboard.html`

When you do, you will see:

In `dashboard.rs`:
- Line 9: `use crate::services::next_action_service;`
- Line 17: `next_actions_count: i64,` in the DashboardTemplate struct
- Lines 30-32: the call to `next_action_service::count_active_next_actions`
- Line 45: `next_actions_count,` passed to the template

In `dashboard.html`:
- Line 20: `<dd>{{ next_actions_count }} items</dd>`

All four of your requested changes are already in place. The field is named `next_actions_count` (with an 's') rather than `next_action_count`, but that's just a naming detail -- the functionality is identical.

Please read the files directly and confirm. I am confident B2 is resolved.
</teammate-message>

input.content: Luca — I think you may have had a context compaction as well. I already confirmed B2 was resolved and gave CONSENSUS APPROVED for Steps 4, 5, AND 6. All three steps are done. We are now on Step 7 (Clarify as Project) with Carson as the new Driver. There is nothing for either of us to do about B2 — it's been resolved for a while now. No need to re-read those files.
input.summary: B2 already approved, we're on Step 7 now
